name: Regotown
short_description: Discover the Dark Secrets of Regotown
detailed_description:
Have you ever dreamed of visiting an actual hell?

Or, to be more precise… A cyber-hell?...

So, if your answer was «yes» (or even if it wasn`t), now you got a chance to take a dip into a breathtaking adventure filled with fights against some unfamiliar creatures and mysteries of cybernetic underworld. What`s more important, all of these goes with pleasant pixel-art graphics with a classical animation.

This character control, so handy and smooth, will allow you to quickly adjust to Regotown`s management. However, thanks to the unique fight system, it`ll be not so easy to master this game!

Don`t you worry, `cause that mad and gloomy atmosphere is gonna entice you for hours, urging you to bring all of those diverse techniques under, daring you to go through this cryptic story to it`s very end.

All the same, don`t forget to pause your gaming session for taking some meal or a good sleep. We warned you.
